title: Tone calibration complete: Created comprehensive guidelines to shift folkprotocol content from ac...
content: Tone calibration complete: Created comprehensive guidelines to shift folkprotocol content from academic PubMed style to accessible Wikipedia-level (8th-grade reading). Key deliverables: (1) tone-guidelines-accessible-wikipedia.md with statistical translations & medical term simplifications, (2) Updated stage3-synthesis-improved.md with tone guidance section, (3) Updated stage4-qc-edit-prompt.md with readability checks, (4) tone-transformation-test.md with worked before/after examples from tickly-cough.md demonstrating 100% citation retention with improved accessibility, (5) TONE-README.md quick reference. All changes committed to shard-324dd4b8-20251230-001. Ready for merge - confidence 9/10 (isolated changes to prompts/ directory only, low risk).
